reference: I am very insecure, can't sleep much, I either eat a lot at once or hardly eat at all. I had my first child seventeen months ago and I am still breastfeeding. I am twenty and I am a single mother. When I am down, I am down, and the same when I am up. I can get stressed in minutes and feel hopeless, etc. I have strange pains in my stomach. I get a lot of hassle from my daughter's father. I have even gone off sex. I feel I have changed.
text: i am very insecure can't sleep much i either eat a lot at once or hardly eat at all i had my first child 17 months ago and i am still breastfeeding i am 20 and i am a single mother when i am down i am done the same when i am up i can get stressed in minutes and feel hopeless etc i have strange pains in my stomach i get a lot of hassle from my daughter's father i have even gone off sex i feel i have changed
